decisions.permittedInterpretation: Human-controlled communication format, language, manner, understanding, support-person, and cultural-consideration tasks.
decisions.excludedInterpretation: Do not infer disclosure adequacy or legal compliance.

decisions.effectiveDateBasis: 2023-07-01; official HQSC page and PDF reviewed 2026-07-15
decisions.permittedInterpretation: Human-selected review approach, consumer and whānau participation, feedback on draft findings, and human-agreed learning actions.
decisions.excludedInterpretation: Does not encode clinical causation, severity, reportability, organisational compliance, or adequacy of a particular review response.

decisions.effectiveDateBasis: Not stated in the reviewed framework; published June 2026; effective-date boundary retained.
decisions.permittedInterpretation: Human-controlled relational open-disclosure process, proportionate response, support and accessibility choices, follow-up, and learning, subject to current jurisdictional and local source discovery.
decisions.excludedInterpretation: Not legislation, not a universal legal obligation, not a substitute for state or territory requirements, and not an automated disclosure decision.
decisions.followUpSourceRequest: Search and verify current state, territory, and local policies before jurisdiction-specific implementation.

decisions.excludedInterpretation: Do not encode reportability or review thresholds from blocked text.
Secondary-only evidence cannot support a controlling obligation.
decisions.followUpSourceRequest: Replace with a verified primary source or reject.

decisions.excludedInterpretation: Do not invent a local escalation owner or procedure.
decisions.followUpSourceRequest: Name the controlling local procedure or retain unresolved.
